title: Another Not-ready Set is passed as the second argument for function 'in'
description:
_Important: This issue was automatically generated and is used by CI for matching failures. DO NOT modify the body content. DO NOT remove labels._
Test name: Logical error: Not-ready Set is passed as the second argument for function 'A (STID: 0250-4e52)
CI report: [AST fuzzer (arm_asan)](https://s3.amazonaws.com/clickhouse-test-reports/json.html?REF=master&sha=6ea70d359e0c2d87d10dd5cb9bca56dfa8e98b25&name_0=MasterCI&name_1=AST%20fuzzer%20%28arm_asan%29)
CIDB statistics: [cidb](https://play.clickhouse.com/play?user=play&run=1#)
---
### Describe the bug
Not sure if related to https://github.com/ClickHouse/ClickHouse/issues/76721. Does not require IN subquery in PK definition.
### How to reproduce
Start MinIO, then run:
```sql
CREATE TABLE t0 (c0 Int) ENGINE = S3(s3, filename = 'file.csv');
INSERT INTO TABLE t0 (c0) VALUES (1);
SELECT 1 FROM t0 WHERE 1 = ANY(SELECT 1) SETTINGS use_index_for_in_with_subqueries = 0; --Logical error
```

bug_features_seed: CREATE TABLE t1 (id INT, name VARCHAR(255), value FLOAT) ENGINE = OBTable();
INSERT INTO t1 (id, name, value) VALUES (1, 'test', 10.5);
CREATE TABLE t2 (ref_id INT, description VARCHAR(255)) ENGINE = OBTable();
INSERT INTO t2 (ref_id, description) VALUES (1, 'description for test');
SELECT * FROM t1 WHERE id IN (SELECT ref_id FROM t2) AND value = (SELECT value FROM t1 WHERE id = 1);
key_bug_features: Not-ready Set passed as second argument for function 'in'
